message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Retrieve Part value

actor User
participant "libdrift" as libdrift
box "driftd service" #LightBlue
participant "Advertisement channel" as AdChannel
participant "Control channel" as CtrlChannel
participant "driftd" as driftd
end box
participant "Neo4j" as Neo4j
participant "MongoDB" as MongoDB

User -> libdrift : get Part value

note left of libdrift
Retrieval message contains
index specifier
index value
end note

libdrift -> driftd : send retrieval message

libdrift <-- driftd : ACK

driftd -> Neo4j : get Part value

Neo4j -> Neo4j : Lookup Part UUID in index

Neo4j -> MongoDB : Get Part info

alt Composite Part
    loop foreach Part
        Neo4j -> MongoDB : Get Part metadata with UUID
        Neo4j -> MongoDB : Get Part values
    end
else Simple Part
    Neo4j -> MongoDB : Get Part metadata with UUID
    Neo4j -> MongoDB : Get Part values
end

driftd -> driftd : build update message

driftd -> AdChannel : Update messages for Part values

AdChannel -> User : receive update message

@enduml
```
